SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARTA RESEN. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLANO, YOHANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, EDMOND $505.52 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $505.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
